metadata.archetype_justification: Build-time npm package (Serverless Framework plugin) that generates CloudFormation templates via AWS CDK. No runtime server, no persistent data store, no HTTP surface.
metadata.context: Serverless Framework plugin providing higher-level AWS constructs.

evaluations.title: Documented API Interface
evaluations.reasoning: Library exports a programmatic TypeScript API through its plugin interface, not an HTTP/REST/GraphQL API. TypeScript type declarations serve as the documented interface.

evaluations.title: Machine-Readable API Specification
evaluations.reasoning: No HTTP/RPC surface — machine-readable spec is not applicable. TypeScript declarations and JSON Schema construct definitions serve as machine-readable contracts.

evaluations.title: Structured Error Responses
evaluations.reasoning: No HTTP/RPC surface — structured error responses are not applicable. Custom ServerlessError class with typed error codes provides equivalent functionality.

evaluations.title: Idempotent Write Operations
evaluations.reasoning: agent_scope is read-only. CloudFormation template generation is inherently idempotent.

evaluations.title: Structured Response Format
evaluations.reasoning: Library produces CloudFormation JSON templates as output. CLI commands output plain text to stdout.

evaluations.title: Asynchronous Operation Support
evaluations.reasoning: Template generation is synchronous and fast. No long-running operations exceed 30 seconds within the plugin.

evaluations.title: Event Emission for State Changes
evaluations.reasoning: Library has no runtime state changes to emit events for. Generates EventBridge infrastructure for user applications.

evaluations.title: Rate Limit Documentation and Headers
evaluations.reasoning: No HTTP/RPC surface — rate limiting is not applicable. Local CLI tool.

evaluations.title: Machine Identity Authentication
evaluations.reasoning: System does not issue or enforce identities — authentication is delegated to the Serverless Framework and AWS SDK credential chain.

evaluations.title: Scoped Permissions (Least Privilege)
evaluations.reasoning: Library generates well-scoped IAM policies with specific actions per resource (no wildcards). Does not enforce permissions itself.

evaluations.title: Action-Level Authorization
evaluations.reasoning: Library generates action-level IAM policies distinguishing read vs write operations. Does not enforce authorization itself.

evaluations.title: Identity Propagation and Delegation
evaluations.reasoning: Build-time tool — does not handle identity propagation. Generates Lambda authorizers for Webhook construct.

evaluations.title: Credential Management
evaluations.reasoning: Credentials sourced from environment variables or local config files. No hardcoded credentials. AWS credentials delegated to SDK chain.

evaluations.title: Immutable Audit Logging
evaluations.reasoning: Surface-flag downgrade: system does not execute agent-invoked write operations — audit logging is a consumer responsibility.

evaluations.title: Agent Identity Suspension
evaluations.reasoning: System does not issue or enforce agent identities — suspension is a consumer responsibility.

evaluations.title: Compensation and Rollback
evaluations.reasoning: Surface-flag downgrade: system exposes no write operations — compensation logic is not applicable. CloudFormation provides built-in rollback.

evaluations.title: Queryable Current State
evaluations.reasoning: Construct outputs() methods query CloudFormation stack outputs for deployed resource state.

evaluations.title: Concurrency Controls
evaluations.reasoning: agent_scope is read-only. Build-time tool with no persistent state.

evaluations.title: Circuit Breakers and Resilience
evaluations.reasoning: AWS API call resilience is delegated to the Serverless Framework's AWS provider.

evaluations.title: Rate Limiting and Throttling
evaluations.reasoning: No HTTP/RPC surface — API-layer rate limiting is not applicable. Local build-time execution.

evaluations.title: Blast Radius and Transaction Limits
evaluations.reasoning: agent_scope is read-only. Blast radius bounded by CloudFormation stack policies.

evaluations.title: Infrastructure Capacity for Agent Traffic
evaluations.reasoning: Local build-time tool — no backend infrastructure to size for agent traffic.

evaluations.title: Draft/Pending State
evaluations.reasoning: agent_scope is read-only. Generate-then-deploy workflow inherently provides human review point.

evaluations.title: Configurable Approval Gates
evaluations.reasoning: agent_scope is read-only. Approval gates managed at CI/CD layer.

evaluations.title: Sandbox/Staging Environment
evaluations.reasoning: Library uses Jest test fixtures with mocked AWS for local testing. Consumers maintain their own staging.

evaluations.title: Sensitive Data Classification
evaluations.reasoning: Stage A = No — not a data-handling target. No PII/PHI/financial/credential data is stored, processed, or logged.

evaluations.title: Data Residency and Sovereignty
evaluations.reasoning: Surface-flag downgrade: no persistent data store and no user-data logging — residency requirements do not apply.

evaluations.title: Selective Query Support
evaluations.reasoning: No data query endpoints. Construct outputs return single values — no unbounded result sets.

evaluations.title: System of Record Designations
evaluations.reasoning: Library does not own persistent state. CloudFormation stacks are the system of record.

evaluations.title: Temporal Metadata and Freshness
evaluations.reasoning: getStackOutput() queries live CloudFormation API. No stale data concerns.

evaluations.title: PII Redaction in Logs
evaluations.reasoning: System does not log user data. Diagnostic logging only.

evaluations.title: Data Quality Awareness
evaluations.reasoning: Library does not manage datasets. No data quality metrics applicable.

evaluations.title: Schema Versioning and API Contracts
evaluations.reasoning: Semantic versioning via npm. TypeScript declarations as API contracts. JSON Schema for construct configs. No breaking change detection in CI.

evaluations.title: Semantically Meaningful Field Names
evaluations.reasoning: All field names are human-readable and self-describing. No legacy abbreviations.

evaluations.title: Data Catalog / Metadata Layer
evaluations.reasoning: Comprehensive per-construct documentation in docs/ directory.

evaluations.title: Distributed Tracing and Structured Logging
evaluations.reasoning: Library/utility — tracing and correlation are consumer concerns. Logger adapter supports structured output in Serverless v3.

evaluations.title: Alerting on Error Rates and Latency
evaluations.reasoning: Library/utility — alerting is a consumer concern. Library generates CloudWatch alarms for deployed infrastructure.

evaluations.title: Business Outcome Metrics
evaluations.reasoning: Build-time utility — business metrics not applicable.

evaluations.title: Infrastructure Governance for Agent-Facing Surface
evaluations.reasoning: This is a library repository. This question does not apply.

evaluations.title: CI/CD with API Contract Testing
evaluations.reasoning: This is a library repository. This question does not apply.

evaluations.title: Rollback Capability
evaluations.reasoning: This is a library repository. This question does not apply.

evaluations.title: API Test Coverage
evaluations.reasoning: This is a library repository. This question does not apply.

evaluations.title: Encryption at Rest for Agent-Accessible Data
evaluations.reasoning: This is a library repository. This question does not apply.
